# Support for MxPlot

Thank you for using MxPlot!

## 💬 Private Feedback / Inquiries
If you have private questions, general feedback, or if you're not sure whether to open a public issue, please use our Google Form:

👉 **[MxPlot Feedback & Contact Form](https://forms.gle/7DWskjz3SFuA4zem8)**

*Note: Response is at the author's discretion and pace. Not all inquiries may receive a reply.*

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Feature Requests
For public technical discussions or bug reports, please feel free to open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/u1bx0/mxplot/issues).
